name: cart_page_4_cart

observed_strengths.observation: Clean, unambiguous cart with line item, editable quantity stepper, Remove link, and a single prominent 'Checkout' CTA
'Special instructions for seller' field present, and shipping/taxes clearly deferred to checkout to avoid surprise

missing_or_weak.observation: No free-shipping progress bar in the cart even though a $50 threshold exists — shoppers below $50 get no nudge to add items (cart subtotal shown $5.00)
No in-cart upsell, cross-sell, or recommended add-ons (cart_upsell_present is false in the journey data)
No trust badges, return-policy reassurance, or accepted-payment icons rendered on the cart page itself

purchase_path_notes: Cart → checkout is a single click, but the cart does nothing to grow basket size despite a stated $50 free-shipping threshold.
